Author: platis
Name: XIV.fm
Punchline: Share what you are listening to in Final Fantasy XIV.
Description: XIV.fm displays Last.fm listening presence on cards anchored above player nameplates.
Changelog:
Pose-aware card anchoring now follows FFXIV's current game-computed nameplate position, including sitting, lying, emote, and mount offsets.

Adds local anchor-height diagnostics for in-game validation and includes the corrected Last.fm browser callback flow.
